title: AuditEvent
$comment: A9 SDK public I/O schema: public-safe audit/provenance metadata contract only. Audit logging is append-only and must outlive the data it describes (AC-T3 / FD-9). This schema captures public audit metadata only and must never expose private engine traces, chain-of-thought, hidden reasoning, raw prompts, raw provider responses, cross-tenant learning data, matching/trust/scoring internals, weights/tiers, or tenant knowledge-graph internals. It does not close DD-3 and does not declare B2 complete.
